framework.name: Stripe as VIC Integration Partner, Not Competitor
framework.description: Stripe is listed among 100+ ecosystem partners integrating Visa's VIC protocols alongside OpenAI, Perplexity, and DBS Bank. This suggests Stripe is building ON Visa's rails rather than competing with its own agent-payment stack.
framework.raw_quote: With over 100 ecosystem partners—including OpenAI, Perplexity, Stripe, and DBS Bank—already integrating these protocols

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce: How Visa is Architecting the Era of Agentic ...
